description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a light gray exterior and white trim, featuring a prominent front porch supported by columns and a gabled roof with dormer windows. The property includes a single-car garage attached to the left side, a paved driveway, and a manicured front lawn with a small tree and shrubbery. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio area with outdoor furniture, a swimming pool, and additional landscaping, including trees and a grassy yard. Multiple windows of varying sizes are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear facades, providing ample natural light. The roof is primarily gabled, with decorative elements such as dormers and a small balcony above the porch. The overall design blends traditional and modern suburban architectural elements, creating a welcoming and functional family home.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a gabled roof, front porch, attached garage, and a backyard featuring a patio and swimming pool. The exterior is light gray with white trim and symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, attached garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and partial view of the backyard with the pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious patio, swimming pool, outdoor furniture, and large windows overlooking the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the transition from the front yard to the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with dormer and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with steps, white columns, decorative railing, and a single main door
